category_sources: Official README at https://github.com/ipfs/ipget describes ipget as a standalone wget-like downloader for IPFS.
source_facts.description says ipget retrieves files over IPFS and saves them locally.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/ipfs/ipget uses the name ipget.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/ipfs/ipget#readme provides install, examples, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/ipfs/ipget, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README at https://github.com/ipfs/ipget says ipget downloads files and directory structures from the IPFS network.
source_facts.description says it retrieves files over IPFS.
